records.transaction_type_reason: Uploading company's TRN and name do not match vendor or customer on the invoice.
confidence_notes: Line item quantity could not be reliably extracted due to column ambiguity and conflicting values (RATE vs AMOUNT).
Line item tax_amount set to null as the printed value corresponds to the total invoice VAT, not line-specific VAT.

Line item net_amount uses the value from the 'AMOUNT' column, which is typically a pre-tax subtotal for the line, due to inconsistencies in the 'NET AMT' column for the line item (it reflects the overall invoice net amount).
